title: Historical content available
content: v23 introduces a set of templates you can choose from when starting a career, including historical F1 seasons and the option to use real driver names.
linkText: Find out more in the full changelog

title: Team performances and improved contracts
content: v22 came out last week with a focus on simulating more of the teams behavior, and a revamped contract presentation.
linkText: Find out more in the full changelog

title: New race objectives system
content: v21 is out, and now you will start to receive objectices for select races during the season. Achieve them to improve your relationship with the team, ignore them at the risk of being out of contract for the next year...
linkText: Find out more in the full changelog

title: New driver and team profile pages, post raceanalysis...
content: The last couple of versions brought new driver and team pages, now much more explorable! You'll also notice a more detailed post-race report.
linkText: Find out more in the full changelog
